creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250800
Patch

See licenses at:
https://cvs.savannah.gnu.org/viewvc/global/global/LICENSE?view=markup

Perl is not normally needed to use Global.  Only a few niche Perl scripts are distributed with Global.  Based on similar situations, the best policy is probably to simply drop the dependency on Perl completely.

This is a followup to bug 270990.
